Commercial Janitorial Services in New York City

Full-service facility cleaning for offices, schools, medical facilities, churches, and government buildings. MBE-certified. Every cleaning verified in real-time through JaniTrack.

Schedule a Free Walkthrough → 347-332-9348
✓MBE / MWBE Certified
✓SAM.gov Registered
✓$2M+ Insurance
✓24/7 Emergency Service

Finding a reliable janitorial company in New York City shouldn't be this hard. Missed cleanings, inconsistent quality, surprise charges, and zero accountability — that's what most facility managers deal with. GreenPoint Maintenance Services Corp exists to end that cycle.

We provide commercial janitorial and facility maintenance programs tailored to the specific compliance, safety, and quality standards your facility requires. Whether you manage a school with CDC-compliant sanitization requirements, a medical office with OSHA protocols, or a government building with procurement compliance standards — we build a custom cleaning program around your facility's needs, not a one-size-fits-all package.

Every cleaning session is documented and verified in real-time through JaniTrack, our proprietary system that provides timestamped photo evidence, GPS-tagged task completion, and ATP bioluminescence readings that scientifically measure surface cleanliness. Your board, tenants, or regulatory bodies get measurable proof — not promises.

Services Included

What's Included

Daily & Nightly Janitorial

Scheduled cleaning programs for lobbies, restrooms, offices, classrooms, and common areas. Customized checklists for your facility type and traffic patterns.

Disinfection & Sanitization

Electrostatic disinfection with hospital-grade sanitizers. ATP bioluminescence testing verifies pathogen elimination on high-touch surfaces.

Floor Care & Restoration

Strip, seal, and refinish hard floors. Carpet extraction and encapsulation. Marble, stone, and VCT maintenance programs for high-traffic commercial spaces.

Day Porter Services

On-site daytime staff for continuous upkeep — restroom monitoring, lobby presentation, conference room readiness, and supply replenishment.

Facility Maintenance

Light plumbing, electrical, HVAC filter changes, painting touch-ups, and general handyman services under one contract and one invoice.

Post-Construction Cleanup

Three-stage professional cleanup: rough clean, light clean, and final touch. Debris removal, dust elimination, and final inspection. Move-in ready in 48 hours.

Why GreenPoint

Why Facility Managers Choose GreenPoint

JaniTrack Verification
The only local provider with real-time photo documentation, GPS tracking, and ATP bioluminescence testing. See proof of every cleaning session.
MBE / MWBE Certified
Registered with NYC & NYS. Qualifies for diversity procurement programs and MWBE set-aside contracts at city, state, and federal level.
Fixed-Price Proposals
Transparent, per-facility pricing. No hourly billing, no surprise fees, no hidden charges. Know exactly what you'll pay every month.
Vertical-Specific Protocols
Dedicated cleaning protocols for schools, churches, medical, daycare, government, and commercial offices. Not a one-size-fits-all approach.
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

We serve six core verticals: K-12 schools and charter schools, churches and houses of worship, healthcare and medical offices, daycare and childcare centers, government and municipal buildings, and commercial office spaces. Each has dedicated protocols for its compliance and safety requirements.

Pricing depends on facility type, square footage, frequency, and scope. We provide fixed-price proposals with no hidden fees after a complimentary walkthrough. Try our instant quote calculator for a preliminary estimate.

JaniTrack real-time cleaning verification with timestamped photos, GPS-tagged task completion, and ATP bioluminescence testing. Plus MBE/MWBE certification, SAM.gov registration, and $2M+ insurance coverage.

Yes — 24/7 emergency response for water damage, biohazard incidents, post-event cleanup, and post-construction work. Call 347-332-9348 for immediate dispatch.

We cover all five boroughs — Bronx, Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, and Staten Island — plus Westchester County, and the broader tri-state region including NJ, CT, PA, and FL.

Every GreenPoint team member undergoes a comprehensive background check before assignment. We carry full commercial general liability insurance, workers' compensation, and bonding.
